narrative:
Crysencio Summerville is a Left Winger representing the Kingdom of the Netherlands. His overall rating of 7.1/10 places him among the top 6% of left wingers at this tournament. This rating reflects a blend of his club form and World Cup performances.

Summerville has been remarkably effective at this World Cup, scoring 0.711 goals per 90 minutes and providing 0.711 assists per 90 minutes. This output significantly outpaces his expected goals of 0.037 and expected assists of 0.15 per 90 minutes. His club form over the last two seasons shows 0.175 goals and 0.078 assists per 90 minutes, indicating a strong surge in World Cup productivity.

Summerville appears to be a highly impactful offensive player for the Kingdom of the Netherlands, contributing significantly despite limited minutes played (253). Scouts should closely monitor if he can sustain his exceptional finishing, given his low expected goals and assists. His active defensive contributions, including 1.423 tackles per 90 minutes, also warrant attention in upcoming matches.
